findings.summary: 1 declared live region(s) on http://127.0.0.1:8777/search-focus-stays-in-input.html (aria-live/status/alert/log) never produced an announcement during this session: #root > div > div
findings.persona_impact: If this region is meant to announce dynamic updates (e.g. form errors, confirmations), a screen-reader user never hears them on this path.
